medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Patient presented to hospital with history of several days of abdominal pain as well as elevated white blood cell count and transaminatis. Patient denied diarrhea and blood in the stool.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Trophic vaginitis, atypical mycobacterial infection, elevated cholesterol, granuloma annulare, heart murmur, hypothyroidism, osteoarthritis, osteopenia, paresthesia, cough variant asthma, squamous cell carcinoma.
medical_history.family_history: Father died of lymphoma. Mother had a CABG.

physical_examination.general_examination: VS: 99.3F, 94, 156/98, 16, 96% RA. Abd - soft, non-distended, TTP in lower quadrants, no rebound, no guarding.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Heart - RRR. Lungs - breathing comfortably on RA. Extrem - warm, no edema.
